framework_instructions:
- This project uses Next.js 15 with Tailwind CSS v3 and TypeScript strict mode.
- globals.css contains only base Tailwind directives. Do NOT use @apply in CSS files.
- All styling via Tailwind utility classes in JSX className attributes.
- Dark theme only: bg-[#0a0a0a], text-[#ededed], borders [#1f1f1f]/[#2a2a2a]. Use hex arbitrary values, NOT named Tailwind colors (no bg-green-500 etc).
- Use 'use client' directive for components with hooks/interactivity.
- Export pages as export default function PageName() — NOT arrow functions.
- Only import packages listed in package.json. Do NOT add new dependencies.
- Server components fetch from Supabase directly (createClient from @supabase/supabase-js).
- Client components receive data as props — no fetch() calls inside client components.
- Sidebar is always w-[220px], bg-[#0a0a0a], sticky, with 🦞 brand + nav + Schellie footer.
- Active nav item: bg-[#1a1a1a] text-[#ededed]. Inactive: text-[#888] hover:bg-[#111111].
- TypeScript: no implicit any. Use explicit types for all props and data shapes.
